column1: He is doing his homework. ... homework is difficult.
If you lend me … few coins, I would buy … newspaper.
He was late, I had to wait for him for half … hour.
She ate … ice cream and as … result she got … sore throat.
Would you like to go for … walk with me in the evening?
There are ... beautiful buildings in the streets.
There are ... beautiful parks and gardens in the town.
This student is the (attentive) in our group.
